title: Scyap's Barista Mod
description: This mod adds coffee berries, coffee drinks, and a kettle into Minecraft
body:
# YouTube Video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3WhyiZUwCeA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This mod adds coffee berries, coffee beans, and a kettle into Minecraft.


# Content:
- Adds Coffee Berries, Coffee Beans and Roasted Coffee Beans.
- Adds Clay Cups, Ceramic Cups and Glass Cups.
- Adds Kettle (To craft coffee items).
- Adds Espresso, Cortado, Flat White, Cappuccino, Latte, Americano, Mocha, Espresso Macchiato and Latte Macchiato.
- Adds Cup of Water, Steamed Milk and Frothed Milk
- Adds Sweetness Level Component to Coffee Drinks (Will give speed boost with different duration, refer to Coffee Sweetness Level Mappings).


# Features:
## Coffee Berries and Coffee Beans
- Coffee Berries can be found naturally generated in Savanna biomes.
- Coffee Berries can be crafted into Coffee Beans.
- Coffee Beans can be cooked into Roasted Coffee Beans.
  
## Kettle Block
- Kettle only activates when placed on a tagged heat source block (Working furnace block or magma block) and has at least one water level (Water Bottle - 1, Bucket of Water - 3).
- Kettle starts boiling progress when above conditions are met, once boiling progress is completed, coffee brewing feature is unlocked.
- Kettle will start deactivating if it has no water level or is no longer on a tagged heat source block, which will then start locking the coffee brewing feature, making it unavailable.
- Brewing Espresso or Hot Chocolate will drain 1 water level, other drinks will not drain water level.
- Adding sugar into coffee will not drain water level.
  
## Coffee Drinks and Sweetness Level
- All coffee drinks can be crafted using the kettle (Refer to Drink Recipes section or watch YouTube video for reference)
- All coffee drinks begins with a sweetness level of 0 labelled as "No Sugar".
- All coffee drinks can increase sweetness level by 1 level using 2 Sugar items up until a maximum level of 5.
- All coffee drinks will retain sweetness level even after being crafted into another coffee drink, if applicable (e.g. Espresso -> Americano)
- All coffee drinks will give player speed boost with varying durations based on sweetness level when consumed (Refer to Coffee Sweetness Level Mappings section)
- Any coffee drinks without the sweetness level component (i.e. Getting it from the creative inventory menu/has no tooltip label) will be given the sweetness level when adding sugar (+1 Sweetness Level) or being crafted into another coffee drink if applicable (+0 Sweetness Level)


# Drink Crafting Recipes in Kettle Block:
- Espresso (2 Roasted Coffee Beans + Ceramic Cup)
- Cortado (Espresso + Steamed Milk + Glass Cup)
- Flat White (Cortado + Steamed Milk + Glass Cup)
- Cappuccino (Cortado + Frothed Milk + Glass Cup)
- Latte (Flat White + Frothed Milk + Glass Cup)
- Espresso Macchiato (Espresso + Frothed Milk + Glass Cup)
- Latte Macchiato (Espresso + Frothed Mikk + Steamed Milk)
- Americano (Espresso + Glass Cup of Water + Glass Cup)
- Mocha (Cappuccino + Hot Chocolate + Glass Cup)
- Hot Chocolate (2 Cocoa Beans + Steamed Milk)
- Steamed Milk (Bucket of Milk + Glass Cup)
- Frothed Milk (Bucket of Milk + Ceramic Cup)
  

# Coffee Sweetness Level Mappings:
(Level Number - Tooltip Label - Duration of Speed Boost)
- Level 0 - No Sugar - 5 Seconds
- Level 1 - Quarter Sugar - 7 Seconds
- Level 2 - Half Sugar - 9 Seconds
- Level 3 - Less Sugar - 11 Seconds
- Level 4 - Normal Sugar - 13 Seconds
- Level 5 - More Sugar - 15 Seconds
